import io
import string
import list

fn find_index(_ nums: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  mut i = 0
  mut found = false
  mut idx = 0
  while i < nums.len()
    if not found
      let val = match nums.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if val == target
        found = true
        idx = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if found
    Some(idx)
  else
    None
  end
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  when Some(l)

  when None
    ""
  end

  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    let s = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(s)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
    i = i + 1
  end

  let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end

  match find_index(nums, target)
  when Some(found_idx)
    print("index=#{found_idx}")
  when None
    print("not_found")
  end

  Ok(())
end
